title: Rolled or built-up beam (conventional)
description: Standard rolled section or built-up plate girder. Workflow guidance only.

characterization_items.text: Common rolled shapes are widely available and familiar to fabricators (workflow heuristic v1).
Depth and weight may be less favorable than specialized systems for long spans (workflow heuristic v1).
Additional project-specific pros/cons may be entered manually (placeholder; not evidence).
